title: [Bug]: `stddev_pop()` 返回了预期之外的NULL
description: master分支版本，对于参数为常数的`stddev_pop()`，返回了预期之外的NULL
poc: CREATE RESOURCE UNIT 4c7g MAX_CPU 4, MIN_CPU 4, MEMORY_SIZE '7G';
create resource pool pool_test unit='4c7g', unit_num=1, zone_list=('zone1' ,'zone2', 'zone3');
create tenant test resource_pool_list=('pool_test'), primary_zone='RANDOM',comment 'test tenant', charset='utf8' set ob_tcp_invited_nodes='%', recyclebin=OFF, ob_query_timeout=5000000;
key_bug_features: stddev_pop() returns unexpected NULL for constant parameters
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_data (id INT PRIMARY KEY, value FLOAT, category VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL);
INSERT INTO test_data (id, value, category) VALUES (1, 10.0, 'A');
INSERT INTO test_data (id, value, category) VALUES (2, 20.0, 'B');
SELECT stddev_pop(value) FROM test_data WHERE category = 'A';
SELECT stddev_pop(value) FROM (SELECT value FROM test_data WHERE category = 'B') AS subquery;
